message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for optimal stopping, quarantine mesh gate, and TEE attestation

- optimal_stopping.rs (+129): Algorithm correctness tests for optimal stopping
  decisions, threshold computation, and stopping criterion validation.

- quarantine_mesh_gate.rs (+218): Clone equality for FaultType, FaultScenario,
  FaultScenarioResult, CriterionResult, GateValidationEvent. Comprehensive
  fault scenario validation and gate decision verification tests.

- tee_attestation_policy.rs (+148): Trusted execution environment attestation
  policy validation, quote verification, and policy decision tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
